attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	SOOHA.HEADER_ID,
SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6,
SOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.ORG_ID,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
BILL.BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID AS INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
SOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.CREATED_BY,
SOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
SOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4,
SOOHA.ADL_ATTRIBUTE4,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12  /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID, /*Release8.0*/
CASE WHEN SOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG = 'Y' THEN SOOHA.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE
ELSE NULL
END RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM , /* Rel8.0 AM changes */
SOOHA.BATCH_ID,
SOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOOHA.ACTION_CODE,
SOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG /*REL9 ICW3.0*/,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT, /* REPAIR CHANGES */
(CASE WHEN SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
 WHEN SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END) SS_CODE/*added as part of Performance Tuning in Aug 2010*/,
 /* Added as part of CSSO Chnage */
 SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13 AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
 SOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE
FROM	
$$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA
LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT	HCAR.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID,HCAR.GLOBAL_NAME,HER.SUBJECT_ID AS BILL_TO_SUBJECT_ID   
FROM	
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLES HCAR
INNER JOIN
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS HER  
ON	HCAR.PARTY_ID = HER.PARTY_ID) BILL
ON 	BILL.CUST_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ID = SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID
AND BILL.GLOBAL_NAME  = SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
EOOOHA.HEADER_ID,
EOOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME,
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6,
EOOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
EOOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
EOOOHA.ORG_ID ,
EOOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
EOOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID ,
EOOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
EOOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
EOOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
EOOOHA.CREATED_BY,
EOOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
EOOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
EOOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
EOOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, 
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 , /*Release8 */                   
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12 , /*Relaese 8*/                  
EOOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID , /*Relaese 8*/    
EOOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, /*Relaese 8 AM changes */  
EOOOHA.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE,  /*Relaese 8 AM changes */  
EOOOHA.ADL_ATTRIBUTE4,   
EOOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,  /* ICW */ 
EOOOHA.BATCH_ID,
EOOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
EOOOHA.ACTION_CODE,
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 /* REPAIR changes */,
/* ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGE */
EOOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13 ,
EOOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL EOOOHA
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOOHA
WHERE SOOOHA.HEADER_ID=EOOOHA.HEADER_ID AND SOOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME=EOOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME)
